title: Analisis Kantorku di Hari Rabu
theme: Eksplorasi tentang bagaimana rutinitas kerja yang monoton dan pengamatan sinis terhadap lingkungan sekitar dapat memicu refleksi diri mendalam tentang makna eksistensi, diwarnai humor pahit.

cover.prompt: Cinematic photograph of an office interior on a gentle Wednesday morning. Soft, warm sunlight streams across a desk, illuminating a simple coffee cup, steam gently rising. The composition uses the rule of thirds, with the coffee cup as a focal point, creating a sense of routine and quiet observation. In the very soft background, an out-of-focus entryway or hallway suggests early office activity, maintaining a respectful distance. The atmosphere is calm and reflective, capturing the subtle beginnings of a workday.
cover.style: Cinematic photography, shallow depth of field, warm color grading

meta.plan_summary: Bima, an office worker, begins his Wednesday with cynical observations of colleagues and office absurdities. A printer malfunction sparks an existential crisis about his monotonous career. During lunch, he contrasts his emptiness with a young colleague's simple joys, leading to a profound feeling of loneliness. He finds no dramatic resolution but accepts the absurdity, choosing to write down his observations as a form of release and bitter acceptance of his reality.
meta.target_emotion: introspective reflection, bitter amusement, melancholic recognition, existential dread, cynical humor
